== Notes for [[Item:Q101703|Q101703]] ==

http://pares.mcu.es/ParesBusquedas20/catalogo/description/5928254

http://pares.mcu.es/ParesBusquedas20/catalogo/description/230732

REFERENCE_NUMBERS:
67051AD9584A11EFBBFA9822EF79916CD528
geni:6000000085561822874

[[Category:GEDCOM Notes Pages]][[Category:Pages]]
